page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.12xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance configured with 48 vCPUs and 96.0 GB of system memory. Built on the x86_64 architecture and running on the KVM hypervisor, this server utilizes dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The CPU configuration features 48 physical cores with a single thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is disabled, ensuring predictable, dedicated compute performance per vCPU.

The hardware profile allocates 2.0 GB of memory per core, indicating a compute-heavy resource density. Local storage is not bundled with this instance type, requiring external block storage solutions for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfer between instances and external services.

This instance is designed for workloads requiring high single-threaded performance and dedicated CPU execution, such as high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and compute-intensive web serving. The lack of hyperthreading and the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio make it highly efficient for tasks where CPU execution speed and core isolation are prioritized over massive memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.12xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz. It features 48 vCPUs across 48 physical cores with a single thread per core, providing dedicated, non-hyperthreaded execution. The instance is equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio, and does not include local storage. Network performance is supported by a 25 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, this server is designed for compute-heavy workloads that demand predictable CPU performance and high clock speeds. It is well-suited for batch processing, high-performance computing, and compute-intensive application servers.
